subcodes.first_line: That inviolate sanctuary of the Divine, that trusted custodian of the treasuries of heavenly secrets, is the sovereign of felicity who is the center of divine inspirations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محرم خلوتگاه الهی و امین خزائن اسرار ربانی سرور کامکاریست که مرکز سنوحات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
